statuses: Enterprise Only (write-side posting API; no public read API)
No Public Read API (Partner Posting API Only)
No Public Read API (aggregator; CPC feed-in)
No Public Read API (aggregator; CPC feed-ingest)
No Public Read API (email PPC distribution)
No Public Read API (feed-ingest / distribution only)
No Public Read API (feed-ingest / posting-delivery only)
No Public Read API (schema.org crawl-based aggregator)
Recommended (has publisher Search API; also CPC/CPA feed-ingest)
auths: Annual subscription/registration required for employers, arranged via direct contact with sales (ads@topjobs.lk) rather than self-service signup; no public API.
Employer account registration required (name, email, password, CUIT/tax ID, company data); no public API.
Employer login/registration required (account with password, password-reset flow present); job postings are purchased via Midtrans payment processing. No public API documented.
Employer/recruiter account login required ('Sign In to Bdjobs Recruiter' at recruiter.bdjobs.com); no public API for job data.

For employers submitting vacancies: SFTP upload using username/password credentials, per DWP's official 'Find a Job' Bulk Upload Specification (XML files sent to an SFTP server with assigned credentials). No confirmed public read/search API exists for third parties to consume listings.
N/A - no public API (portal uses role-based login for Job Seeker/Institution/Employer/Department users, not third-party API auth)
No (JobSearch/JobStream read APIs are keyless; a separate authenticated partner API exists only for employers submitting ads)
No (organic crawl; Search Console for monitoring)
No (public RSS job feed at rss.mustakbil.com/jobs-rss is openly accessible without authentication)
No (public portal); partner API requires access
No - datos.gob.mx CKAN API is publicly accessible without authentication (verified via direct call to /api/3/action/package_show, HTTP 200, dataset flagged private:false)

No authentication required to browse/search job vacancies (public); free account registration is required for jobseekers to apply/receive matches and for employers/agencies to post jobs. No public API found on the official site.
No login required to browse publicly posted vacancy/gazette notices on psc.gov.lk; no API or developer access documented.
No, for the published open-data files
Not applicable - no public API found on the official site (nde.gov.ng); no API/developer documentation section exists.

Not self-service - access is restricted to job portals that sign a formal MoU with Kemnaker. Confirmed via official Kemnaker press release that vacancy data sync between Karirhub and integrated partners (HiredToday, Toploker, Redy, Glints) uses API technology, but no publicly documented API key/OAuth mechanism exists for outside developers.
Recruiter account login required ('Recruiter Login' at /recruiter/account) to post jobs; no public API.
Registered user account required (DNI, email, mobile phone) to log in via web browser; no API or programmatic access documented.
Registered user account required (name, CNIC, mobile number, email, password) via njp.gov.pk/register and login.php to search/apply for jobs; no API or developer access documented.
Registered user account required (phone number + OTP verification, then application form) via jobs.gov.pk/jobseeker/account/register and account/login; no API or developer access documented.

Registered user login required (document ID number + password, selecting 'Company' or 'Person' profile type) to search/view individual vacancies; no public API for vacancy data (Colombia's Socrata open-data API only exposes aggregate registration statistics, not live listings).
Unknown (RSS likely open; API terms unspecified)
Unknown - dataset page found on dane.gov.pl, but exact access format (API vs. file download) could not be confirmed
Unknown for the OAS-based apiservice.mol.gov.tw interface; the documented free.taiwanjobs.gov.tw example endpoint appears to require no key
Yes (API key/token per Gupy customer account)
Yes (API secret issued after Vendor Intake Form / partner registration)
Yes (Israeli citizen with Teudat Zehut; register online, then appear in person within 14 days)
Yes (OAuth 1.0a, Consumer Key/Secret; HMAC-SHA1 or PLAINTEXT over HTTPS)
Yes (OAuth per integration; connection_id in calls)
Yes (Saudi-national account; must be 18+; government roles require a bachelor's degree)
Yes (X-RapidAPI-Key; OpenWeb Ninja portal uses x-api-key)
Yes (agency/employer login required for the recruitment management system)
Yes (client account; partner API keys for integrations)
Yes (jobseeker / employer / agency account required to register)
Yes (partner credentials / API token issued after agreement)
Yes (recruiter/employer account; verification mandatory to activate)
Yes (workseeker: SA ID / valid work permit; employer: valid UIF registration number)

Yes - API key (Access Token). TopCV's paid 'Top Developer API' service (data sync with recruitment/HRIS systems) requires an Access Token generated from the employer account's API connection settings on TopCV.
Yes - Bearer token (Settings > Apps and plugins > Personal API tokens)

Yes - Digital Identity (myGovID). Employers/systems connecting to Workforce Australia for Business must reach at least a 'Standard' identity strength on their Digital Identity and link it to their organisation's ABN via Relationship Authorisation Manager (RAM).
Yes - Integration Partner credentials (hostname + channel_token) plus per-account credentials (username/password or access_key/user_email)
Yes - OAuth access token via Indeed Partner Console
Yes - access requires registering on the API Developer Portal (developer.vdab.be) and completing an onboarding process
Yes - all requests need HTTP bearer authorization; public/shared token for testing, private token after registration
Yes - approved access key required per call
Yes - authentication key (인증키) required as a request parameter
Yes - credentials must be requested from jobroom-api@seco.admin.ch
Yes - dados.gov.br CKAN API requires authentication (direct call to /api/3/action/package_show for this dataset returned HTTP 401 without credentials)
Yes - electronic identity verification. Employers must be electronically identified/verified by submitting required information and documents to CareerLink.vn before a job posting is activated.
Yes - partner integration credentials for ATS vendors

Yes - registered users log in with RUN/passport or ClaveÚnica to use the portal. Employers can additionally request an API service ('Servicio API' for JobOfferings/JobPosting) whose access credentials/token are issued through the company profile after a request - this is a real but employer-account-gated API, not a fully open public API.
Yes - requires a registered user ID/password to obtain a same-day access token before each data pull

Yes for the ATS/job-distribution API - an API credential is issued per account by MyJobMag's account manager after activation (custom, per-account terms). MyJobMag's public XML/RSS job feeds require no authentication.
access: None (no consumer-facing public API; employer-side job posting feed only)
Restricted - developer.ceipal.com portal requires sign-in/account approval (confirmed: restricted-access pages on official domain); tied to the CEIPAL ATS platform, not an open public job-data API
